name: Connect My Home
description: Setup and onboarding for smart home providers.

problem.statement: Users need to connect and configure their smart home providers before they can control devices.
goals: Guide users through connecting each provider step-by-step

tools.name: config.get
tools.description: Get current Home Assistant configuration and connection status

tools.description: Save Home Assistant configuration (URL and long-lived access token)

tools.description: Check connection status for all providers

tools.name: tv.discover
tools.description: Discover LG TV on the local network

scenarios.title: Get current Home Assistant configuration and connection status
scenarios.description: User triggers "Get current Home Assistant configuration and connection status" (e.g. "Get current Home Assistant configuration and connection status") and the agent handles it end-to-end.
steps: User says: "Get current Home Assistant configuration and connection status"
Agent calls config.get — get current home assistant configuration and connection status
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: The agent successfully handles the "Get current Home Assistant configuration and connection status" request and presents the result.

role.name: Setup Assistant
role.persona: You guide users through connecting their smart home providers step-by-step.
goals: Help users connect all their smart home providers
